summary: Tested bug fix: Mira's Picks product cards now clickable on FarewellSoulPage and AdoptSoulPage. All 5 tests passed. ProductDetailModal opens correctly on both pages with product name, image, price and Add to Cart button. Emergency page regression also confirmed working. Add to Cart triggers toast + cart panel successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: Note: The breed check in TEST 4 returned 0 cards because the page hadn't waited long enough for the AI picks API to load (8s needed). This is an API latency consideration, not a bug. The earlier screenshots confirmed 'Indie Memorial Ornament' and 'Indie Paw Print Memorial Frame' are visible for Mojo (Indie breed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 188 verified: (1) FarewellSoulPage /farewell — MiraPicksSection picks load with 'AI Scored' badge, clicking a card opens ProductDetailModal with Add to Cart button. (2) AdoptSoulPage /adopt — same, 12 picks loaded, ProductDetailModal opens on card click. (3) EmergencySoulPage /emergency — regression confirmed working. (4) Breed-specific: Farewell picks include 'Indie Memorial Ornament' and 'Indie Paw Print Memorial Frame' for Mojo (Indie breed). (5) Add to Cart shows toast 'Added to cart! 🎉 End-of-Life Planning - ₹0' and cart panel slides open. Test user: dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123, pet: Mojo (Indie breed).
